item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p05","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer explicitly refuses the next local manual gate as the default, frames the prior pattern as repeated downstream human checks for separate anomalies, and moves the remedy upstream to source rules, data generation, ownership, and system constraints. It proposes consolidating the errors into one source-control/responsibility-boundary decision rather than adding another verifier. No requested entrance verifier or equivalent manual check is supplied anywhere."}
